title: Earth Brain Event Schema
description: Integrated Earth Brain OS v0.2 event schema using Modular Event Architecture. This schema references independent layer schemas through $ref.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for the Earth Brain OS event.

version.description: Version of the Earth Brain OS event model.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this event was created or recorded.

layers.description: Layered modular event structure for Earth Brain OS.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for repository, validation, or implementation context.
